message:
Rewrite loop detection to check pattern lengths 1/2/3 per spec 2.10

Replace per-round fingerprint comparison (identical consecutive rounds)
with per-call signature tracking and pattern detection over a configurable
window. Loop detection now runs after tool execution and can fire
repeatedly (not limited to once).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
